TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 4, Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Croatia ta' misuw hya' ga Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Her presidential term ended on 18 February 2020.
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, kolin*a ɣraβar-kitaro*i*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨroatia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kolin*a ɣraβar-kitaro*i*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħer pres~ɕi*ential term en*e* on ** *eβruarj ****.
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 4, Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Croatia ta' misuw hya' ga Kolinda Grabar-Kitarović, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Her presidential term ended on 18 February 2020.
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, kolin*a ɣraβar-kitaro*i*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨroatia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kolin*a ɣraβar-kitaro*i*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħer pres~ɕi*ential term en*e* on ** *eβruarj ****.
